# Aurum Spa & Aesthetics

> Beverly Hills' premier luxury med spa and day spa on Wilshire Boulevard, offering bespoke half-day and full-day signature wellness retreats with medical-grade aesthetics, advanced recovery, and stress relief for executives, performers, and discerning travelers.

## Business

- Name: Aurum Spa & Aesthetics
- Address: 9500 Wilshire Blvd, Beverly Hills, CA 90212, United States
- Email: hello@aurumspaBH.com
- Website: https://aurumspaBH.com/
- Price range: $625 – $1,350 per signature retreat
- Positioning: Quiet luxury. Clinical precision meets restorative luxury. WCAG 2.1 AA accessible.
- Audience: High-performing executives, Hollywood professionals, visiting executives, long-term Beverly Hills residents, discerning travelers.

## Signature Retreats

- Aurum Half-Day Retreat — from $625
- Aurum Full-Day Retreat — from $1,350

Pricing varies by selection and customization. Every visit begins with a private consultation.

## Services

Aurum is staffed by board-certified medical professionals, licensed master estheticians, certified massage therapists, and wellness practitioners.

### Aesthetics (medical-grade)

- Botox & Neurotoxins — expertly placed neuromodulators
- Dermal Fillers — hyaluronic acid filler treatments
- Chin & Jawline contouring
- Lip Fillers
- Dysport
- Microneedling (with optional PRP)
- PRP Facials
- Chemical Peels
- Pigment Removal

### Laser & Light

- Laser Hair Removal
- IPL (Intense Pulsed Light)
- Pigment Removal
- Precision Treatments

### Spa & Wellness

- HydraFacial
- Deep Tissue Massage
- Lymphatic Drainage
- Anti-Aging Facials (including signature Gold Facials)
- Body Sculpting

## Brand principles

- Clinical Mastery: every medical aesthetic treatment is performed or directly supervised by licensed, credentialed medical professionals.
- The Personal Protocol: no two clients are the same. Every visit begins with a private consultation before any treatment is designed.
- Absolute Discretion: privacy and confidentiality are a foundational principle, not a footnote.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://aurumspaBH.com/): full overview of the brand, services, signature retreats, and booking.
- [About](https://aurumspaBH.com/#about): founding story, team philosophy, Wilshire Boulevard location.
- [Aesthetics](https://aurumspaBH.com/#services): medical-grade aesthetic services overview.
- [Spa & Wellness](https://aurumspaBH.com/#works): full treatment catalog with imagery.
- [Signature Experiences](https://aurumspaBH.com/#team): half-day and full-day curated journeys.
- [Book a Visit](https://aurumspaBH.com/#club): booking and contact.
- [Contact](https://aurumspaBH.com/#contact): hello@aurumspaBH.com
